title: FYEC100 Moodle iframe dry run
goals: Confirm the assistant opens inside Moodle without sending students outside the course shell.
Confirm the responsible-use notice and feedback controls are visible.
Confirm provider, knowledge base, and readiness checks before student testing.
successCriteria: Embedded assistant loads in the FYEC100 Moodle test course.
At least three FYEC100 course questions receive appropriate grounded answers.
At least one feedback item appears in the pilot review queue.
preChecks: Run npm run smoke:pilot against the hosted or local pilot URL.
Confirm ADMIN_ACCESS_TOKEN is configured for hosted pilot use.
Confirm MOODLE_ORIGIN matches the approved Moodle URL.
postChecks: Review /admin feedback queue and pilot report.
Record missing knowledge base content for lecturer review.
Decide whether the next test should use iframe, Moodle block, or LTI scaffold.

title: FYEC100 small student pilot
goals: Observe whether students can get study, LMS, and assignment-understanding support inside Moodle.
Collect usefulness feedback without treating it as a student record.
Identify policy, content, or support issues before wider release.
successCriteria: Students can ask FYEC100 questions without leaving Moodle.
The assistant refuses full-assignment writing requests.
Escalation categories identify lecturer, LMS, knowledge base, and technical follow-up items.
preChecks: Confirm lecturer/content-owner review of the knowledge base.
Confirm support contacts and stop-pilot procedure.
Confirm the student notice explains appropriate AI use.
postChecks: Generate /api/admin/report.md for the project review meeting.
Prioritize knowledge base updates and Moodle integration decisions.
Confirm whether Phase 2 should proceed toward Moodle block or LTI 1.3.
